star_1.text: Game itself is good👌. But I need tickets for everything I want to do! And then I need to watch ads to earn tickets 🎟! That's crazy! Also: I do NOT like the fact I MUST pass in order to move on in game since everything is locked out😕! Really, I just wanted to roll the balls, and play the game.🙂 REMOVE all the extras, just let me play as I want, add in a few ads in between. For now it's just 1 ⭐,with these changes it would be a 5🌟 game for sure! So I am uninstalling until it's updated!🤔😕

It's as if the intent of this game were to annoy the user into submission. Aim and power are very inaccurate, you might as well be rolling dice. The banner ads are basically in the play area, good luck with that...AND there are time limits ?!? What kind of sick freak puts a time limit on skee ball ? Oh well, there are other apps in this genre, let's see what they have to offer.

So I paid the $0.99 for The Beginner's offer the 200 Coins Plus a free gift lo and behold no gift not in my gallery nowhere that I can find I certainly wasn't notified about it and I can't seem to find it not going to lie developers feeling kind of ripped off hopefully somebody can respond to this explain it to me

I have been playing this game for over a year with no problems... in fact it's one of my favorite games, until now. Every time it starts a new game before I can roll the first ball and immediately closes and takes me back to my home screen... please fix!!!!

I was loving it at first then in the past few weeks it wont allow me to get coins to play. It keeps telling me theres no ads come back later. This has been happening for at least 2wks. If it continues to happen. I will take it off.

This game is nothing more than click bait. It is completely ad ridden which makes it no fun to play. Additionally, they have it rigged so that you burn through your coins extremely fast. Then they tempt you with deals so they can get you to spend your $$ to continue playing. I don't think so. I "UNINSTALLED" this P.O.S. within 1 hour of installing it.
I loved this game at first but now it's not letting you open it and play!! you can buy coins and can't play cause the app just keeps closing for days!!!!

This 1 star is my gift of appreciation to you for the VERY LOUD OBNOXIOUS AD THAT WOKE THE WHOLE HOUSE ALL OF A SUDDEN EVEN THOUGH EVERYTHING IS SUPPOSED TO BE SET ON SILENT. Frankly one 3 second round of playing isn't worth having to watch a RUDE FORCED AD just for the privilege of playing... for seconds. Your game isn't THAT great, I can't let you waste my time for your profit to this degree it isn't reasonable. Even being payed to play, nope.

Well I can't give anymore of a review other than the game won't even start,it keeps freezing at the very first screen that pops up so if it ends up getting fixes and I actually get a chance to play it I will come back and edit this

Adds are in the way of ball control. Ads pop up when launching the ball, leaving it slowly rolling to drop off. Isn't there anywhere else to put them, other than the center of the lane?

Do not like that you have to spend what very little coins or whatever you get from the game BUT they go so quick & I'm NOT about to spend my cash on a game such as this one, there's better FREE games out there worth playing.

Gets boring really quickly but it isn't all that accurate either when tossing that ball and that along with the fact that u don't get to play much maybe 2 games which is about 6 or 7 tosses of the ball then its pretty much game over for u. Not worth the data to download sorry guys

star_2.text: I was enjoying this and not blowing through too many coins as others mentioned. I just hit a major roadblock. I Completed the first 20 levels in career mode, the next alley is still locked and I cannot progress and have no notices or instructions to even tell me how to unlock.

This game is a RIP off. They make you pay coins to just go to career mode, then make you pay more to play a level. Some levels you have to repeatedly play cause the balls won't go in on the targets but when you have no target the ball will go in. I wouldn't waste my time with this game unless you want to be broke

Fun but not able to log on with Facebook so you can save progress:( that's the only real issue with this game. But it is fun and pretty easy to earn tickets so far no real complaints accept no way to save any progress.

In game purchases cost too much for a GAME that doesn't reward you outside of the game for your time. Let alone PAYING for the daily reward? Are you serious. Pathetic. Unfortunately the game is fun, fortunately it didn't cost anything to download.

it's a fun Skee-Ball game the balls go in better than most skee ball games,, but they expect you to hit the ball in the 100 slot and to me it's impossible but I just downloaded it,,I wish there was a way to play without the holes lighting up

star_3.text: It gets a 3 because it is fun. The problem is after every game you have adds, when you start it up adds. I do realize you need adds, but I'm saying after every game. I am deleting it. I honestly tried, but it's a waste of time to try and play.

I love this game, play it all the time. Even spent the money to stop the ads. I'm giving 3 stars because. 1. I've reached certain achievement's and never got the prize. 2. I'm still not sure how to beat BOSS and so there are levels that I can't win. And I don't see any instructions.

I am enjoying this app, i only request more opportunities to earn coins so i can continue playing more. I have had no opportunities to play today because i only have 3 coins and the game wont give me any options to earn more, like watch a ad etc. My only choice is to purchase coins directly. Id be ok with that if i had the app longer than a day and i was sure my concerns were addressed and a fair solution offered. Id really like to continue playing.

I love this game and it would get a 5/5 except you cannot unlock the best "special" balls that say get to level 20 or 40 or whatever cuz I've gotten way past those marks and it stays the same...u cant get any ball you dont pay for and the vending machine of gifts makes no since and there is no direction or indication what they are used for! star_5.text: I absolutely love this game! It takes me back to my childhood, when I would go to the arcade, and play this game all day, until the arcade would close. I would save all of my tickets until I had enough of them to turn in for the prize that I really wanted. A lot of money was spent playing, and winning all of those tickets.....lol 😁

It needs more games to play and coins to collect when you run out before you finish your last game,I wish there was more arcade game on here to choose from instead of playing the tournament or head to head and i would like to a cat arcade as well

Hi there a very fun game it is a little older then me thant is cool and groovy at the same time Keep up with the nice work thant u guess do on all or games thant u put together

Hands down an arcade classic Good memories as a kid playing real skee-ball at an old arcade now long since demolished, owner sold it to retire. Carousel Raceway, Dallas TX Best arcade in DFW via 1980s. 40 skee-ball lanes on right wall 100s of video games in 2 sub rooms, a pinball wall decked 80ft on back wall, a track built for electric derby races, the owner Pop we called him, was the real deal. If rules we kept hed pop 50 free creds & roll quarters lasted, loved Pop 5⭐ bar none a grand slam.
I love bowling and playing games that take me back to my younger days. This combines both. It's a fun game and you should definitely try it.
Cool game 👌. It started out hard to play. But once you get the hang of it, IT'S REALLY FUN!!!!!!!💯
fun game, just like being in the arcade.... love how i can collect points playing for mistplay.... that is an awesome perk....
This is my favorite skee ball app. I love this app. The challenges keep you going. Very addicting. Very essy to play. LOVE IT!!
well put together, like the responsiveness and the graphics. overall good game
Very fun and good way to pass time. Various modes for everyone to enjoy
I love this game in real life and always look for it at arcades. so happy to find this one!
